title: sum(least(a, NULL)) result error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (a INTEGER, b INTEGER, c REAL);
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN a IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE a END + CASE WHEN b IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE b END + CASE WHEN c IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE c END) FROM t2;
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN a IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE a END + COALESCE(b, 0)) FROM t2;
key_bug_features: least(a, NULL) in SUM/AVG function returns incorrect result
